title: SKYLEO LED Desk Lamp - Double Head Desk Light with Remote Control - Eye Protection, 2400 LM, 24W, 5 Color Modes, Timing & Memory, Easy to Install - Suitable for Office, Reading, Drawing - Black
features: Remote control or touch control: adjust brightness and colour temperature in seconds and use the remote control from 15 metres away, so you no longer have to get up. Designed for you who strive for efficient office work.
Multiple Color Temperature Modes Adjustable: 2400LM, 5 lighting modes and 11 brightness settings (Color temperature mode: 3500K~7000K), independently adjustable LED double head desk lamp.
Adjustable double head and holder design: the 75 cm wide double head system provides flexible angle adjustment and comprehensive lighting for a comfortable and productive working environment.
Save space and remember time: the maximum clamping distance of the desk lamp clip is 7 cm, which saves space; comfortable memory function, turn on the light to restore your preferred lighting.

Lamp with eye protection: 24 W table lamp is suitable for lighting computer offices, painting, learning, crafts and other environments. The desk lamp does not flicker, which reduces eye fatigue and fulfils the purpose of eye protection.
